1:
this person is rather cold; it is difficult for them to express their feelings or to commit to a relationship. Such a temperament speaks of weak sexual vibrations or of their deliberate blocking. TEMPERAMENT 0\1 A reduced type of temperament in women gives a tendency to put in a great deal of effort to look as sexual and attractive as possible, through: bright, flashy, aggressive makeup and style of dress. Because of this it is hard to feel real pleasure, and there is a tendency to frequently change sexual partners in search of intense sensations. Men are more inclined toward sexual egoism, confident that the act itself is enough for the partner to be satisfied. When it comes to lofty goals and ambitions, these people are rather calm. It is better for such people to find a partner just like themselves. If there is sex, there is; if not, then not. Pay attention to the ones (1s): if there are many ones, the person can at least express themselves in some way.
It is hard for them to show tenderness, to be affectionate, to express warmth, love and gentleness. There is also a second scenario, when on the contrary the person becomes overly scattered, sometimes vulgar (dressed provocatively), or, in the case of men, overly compliant. A woman may carry masculine habits, masculine behavior, a masculine lifestyle (a go-getter) and love to compete. A man, on the contrary, may be soft and lacking in masculinity.
 They do not particularly need intimacy, except perhaps in the early stages of a relationship.
2: this person can be intimate every day, but if the opportunity is not there they can wait. Quite calm, yet their patience is limited. A moderate, not strong, level of attraction. People of this type tend toward: shyness, blocking of emotions, boyish movements and manners, a masculine or hurried gait, rushing everywhere just as they do in their speech. On the whole, twos express themselves like ones: polygamously, at times with demonstrative vulgarity. They quickly lose attraction and interest in a partner, and in life in general. They constantly crave new sensations, which is why these people are prone to an eternal search.
3:
this is a moderate type which, alongside good sexual potential, gives a sweet, winning charm. It manifests the same way in both men and women. These people love role play and other forms of foreplay; this is precisely how they raise their libido.
It should be noted, however, that temperament 3 is not stable and can express itself as either a high or a low temperament. The person may be intimate every day, but if the opportunity is not there they can wait calmly enough. They can be hot-tempered, with characteristic mood swings (now I love, now I don't). They may be very cold with partners, or on the contrary very passionate and amorous.
4:
stable and quality intimacy with a beloved person is essential. A strong level of charm and attraction. The person will always feel a stable sexual desire for a permanent partner. People of this temperament do not engage in sexual relations with many different people; they choose only one steady partner, provided they are satisfied by that partner.
If both spouses share this temperament, they must not be apart for long stretches of time. Long separations, business trips, and rotational shift work are categorically not recommended, as there is a high risk of physical infidelity. 
A strong level of charm and attraction. They evoke sympathy and trust and win people over. Women with a strong temperament draw men to them; they are very feminine, sexual, and charming. The men are charismatic, masculine, alpha males. Recommendations: if you do not feel within yourself, or the person does not feel, what is written above, or if this woman has gynecological problems forming, such as a cyst, cancer, or fibroid, then the surplus sexual energy needs to be spent in the bedroom. You are holding back such a fiery temperament within yourself. You must unlock your temperament.
